name: Superbowl Party
description:
You wanted to try to get more into sports so you joined a fantasy football league that your friends have every year. Apparently the person in last place for the season has to dress up like a cheerleader during the Superbowl and serve everyone drinks, but you probably won't come in last... right?

*Note by default I don't specify your relationship status, if you want to involve cuckolding or shaming by a spouse just use a character that has a partner or add to the memory that one of the women at the party is your partner
creator: RandomSub
